generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator embedded within the HVAC subsystem that executes control logic (e.g., temperature, airflow adjustments) based on inputs from the Digital Twin via Eclipse Ditto middleware."
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart lighting controller integrated with the Building Control System that adjusts lighting levels based on real-time occupancy data and reinforcement learning policies from the Digital Twin."
]

instance StructuralMonitoringActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator component within the structural monitoring system that executes dynamic load testing and vibration control based on real-time sensor data synchronized with the Digital Twin."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT temperature sensor deployed within the building to capture real-time environmental conditions, integrated via Eclipse Hono middleware with standardized MQTT data format."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalTemperatureData
]

instance RelativeHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT humidity sensor capturing real-time moisture levels, semantically annotated in BIM with tenant associations and spatial locations for automated DT integration."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RelativeHumidityData
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT occupancy sensor detecting presence via motion/PIR technology, with automatic mapping to BIM-based spatial zones for real-time DT synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyData
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart meter capturing real-time energy consumption data (kWh) from building subsystems, standardized via Eclipse Hono for DT integration."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionData
]

instance StructuralVibrationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision vibration sensor monitoring structural integrity, with data preprocessing via Eclipse Hono to extract dynamic load patterns for DT analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData StructuralVibrationData
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance EnvironmentalTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor
]

instance RelativeHumidityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RelativeHumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

instance StructuralVibrationData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom StructuralVibrationSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BuildingInformationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Foundational BIM model containing geometric, spatial, and functional representations of the building with semantic annotations for sensor configurations and control logic."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware, EclipseDittoMiddleware, ModelDrivenEngineeringPipeline
]

instance ReinforcementLearningPolicyModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BOREALIS-based reinforcement learning model for adaptive lighting control, trained on post-occupancy sensor data and integrated with the DT via Eclipse Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EnergyPerformanceSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Life-cycle energy performance simulation model leveraging BIM data and runtime analytics to optimize energy consumption and operational efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationAndOptimizationService
]

instance RuntimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time data including sensor readings, operational logs, and control signals synchronized between physical systems and the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalTemperatureData, RelativeHumidityData, OccupancyData, EnergyConsumptionData, StructuralVibrationData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware, EclipseDittoMiddleware, UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance ControlLogicAnnotations : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "BIM-based semantic annotations containing device IDs, tenant associations, and control logic configurations automatically extracted during DT deployment."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingInformationModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoMiddleware, ModelDrivenEngineeringPipeline
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight IoT middleware providing real-time data ingestion and preprocessing of sensor data (e.g., MQTT standardization) for Digital Twin integration."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PhysicalToVirtualInteraction
]

instance EclipseDittoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service-oriented middleware enabling bidirectional communication between the Digital Twin and physical systems via RESTful APIs and device twin patterns."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationAndOptimizationService
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-fidelity 3D visualization platform enabling immersive monitoring and interaction with the Digital Twin for stakeholder engagement."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringPipeline : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated model-driven pipeline generating runtime artifacts (e.g., control interfaces) from BIM models via model-to-model and model-to-text transformations."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentAutomationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous visualization and analysis of operational data (e.g., energy consumption, environmental conditions) via Unreal Engine for immersive 3D interaction."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionInsight, OccupancyComfortInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of reinforcement learning (BOREALIS) to optimize control policies (e.g., adaptive lighting) based on post-occupancy sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingOptimizationAction, MaintenanceAlertInsight
]

instance SimulationAndOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Life-cycle modeling for energy efficiency, structural performance, and cost optimization leveraging BIM data and runtime analytics."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendation, StructuralPerformanceInsight
]

instance DeploymentAutomationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated generation of runtime artifacts (e.g., Ditto device twins) from BIM data via model-driven engineering to reduce manual configuration."
    DTDFVocab:provides TwinCompositionAction
]

// Additional required instances to resolve references
instance PhysicalToVirtualInteraction : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Pipeline that extracts sensor data from IoT devices via Eclipse Hono and integrates it into the Digital Twin via Eclipse Ditto."
]

instance ServiceExtensibilityFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework enabling extension of Digital Twin services through standardized interfaces and middleware integration."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption insights providing visibility into operational efficiency and potential savings opportunities."
]

instance OccupancyComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Occupant comfort insights derived from temperature, humidity, and occupancy data to inform environmental adjustments."
]

instance LightingOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting levels based on reinforcement learning policies to optimize energy use and occupant satisfaction."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance alerts identifying potential equipment failures based on vibration and performance data analysis."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for reducing energy consumption through operational adjustments and system optimizations."
]

instance StructuralPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of structural integrity and dynamic load performance based on real-time vibration and environmental data."
]

instance TwinCompositionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic composition of subsystem twins (e.g., HVAC, lighting) enabling plug-and-play integration of new building systems."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C18: Environments/Components
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical and virtual environment encompassing the building infrastructure, its control systems, and the Digital Twin constellation."
    base:contains BuildingControlSystem, DigitalTwinCore
]

instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Building Control System integrating sensors, actuators, and controllers that interface with the Digital Twin for real-time monitoring and control."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance DigitalTwinCore : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized Digital Twin instance managing global building-level semantics (e.g., spatial relationships, energy models) derived from BIM."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interactions are achieved through **runtime control logic** generated from BIM models and deployed via standardized middleware interfaces (Eclipse Ditto). The DT processes inputs (e.g., optimization algorithms, user commands) and generates control signals (e.g., actuator commands) that are transmitted back to the physical system via bidirectional communication protocols. For example, the DT may adjust lighting systems or HVAC settings based on occupancy data, with the control actions executed by physical actuators. The framework ensures **low-latency, bidirectional communication** to maintain operational coherence between the virtual and physical systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates across **multiple time scales**, aligned with AECO operational requirements:
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Millisecond-to-second granularity for **sensor data ingestion** and **control signal execution** (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC responses).
  - **Near-real-time analytics**: Minute-to-hourly intervals for **predictive analytics** (e.g., occupancy forecasting, energy consumption trends).
  - **Life-cycle optimization**: Daily-to-weekly timeframes for **long-term performance tuning** (e.g., adaptive control policy refinement in BOREALIS).
  The framework supports **asynchronous event processing** (e.g., alarms, anomalies) alongside **periodic data updates** to balance responsiveness and computational load."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented platform** with standardized interfaces for:
  - **Data ingestion** (from sensors via Hono/Ditto).
  - **Control output** (to actuators via middleware).
  - **Visualization and analytics** (via Unreal Engine and custom services).
  The framework supports **scalable deployment** across multiple buildings or infrastructure systems."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **multiple life-cycle stages** of the physical asset, from **design (as-built)** to **operation (as-operated)**, with phased representations:
   - **Design/Construction Phase**: The DT is initialized from BIM models, incorporating static geometric and semantic data for pre-commissioning validation.
   - **Commissioning Phase**: Runtime data integration begins, with sensor configurations and control logic embedded into the DT via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto).
   - **Operational Phase**: The DT continuously synchronizes with physical systems, enabling real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control (e.g., energy optimization via reinforcement learning in BOREALIS).
   - **Adaptive Phase**: The DT evolves through **runtime updates** (e.g., adding new sensors, integrating custom services) to accommodate changing operational requirements. The framework supports **incremental deployment** to minimize downtime during upgrades."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** (to measure alignment between PT and DT).
  - **Verification and validation** of BIM-to-DT transformations.
  - **Uncertainty modeling** (e.g., sensor noise, model drift).
  The framework addresses **semantic drift** (misalignment between digital and physical representations) via automated synchronization mechanisms."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for **real-time technical connections**, utilizing:
  - **Eclipse Hono**: **Telemetry ingestion layer** with **MQTT/HTTP support** for **sensor data streams** (e.g., temperature, occupancy).
  - **Eclipse Ditto**: **Device management platform** providing **RESTful APIs** for **bidirectional control** (e.g., actuator commands).
  - **Standardized protocols**: **OPC UA** for **industrial IoT integration** and **MQTT** for **lightweight telemetry**.
  Connections are **securely authenticated** via **JWT/OAuth2** mechanisms, though **specific network architectures** (e.g., cloud vs. edge) are not detailed in the documents."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed in a **scalable, middleware-centric architecture** with:
  - **Core middleware**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** hosted on **cloud or on-premise Kubernetes clusters** for **high availability**.
  - **Visualization layer**: **Unreal Engine** deployed as **standalone applications** or **web-based plugins** (e.g., via Unreal’s **HTML5 export**).
  - **Containerization**: **Docker/Kubernetes** supports **modular scaling** of DT services (e.g., analytics, visualization).
  The framework does not specify **exact cloud providers** (e.g., AWS, Azure) but emphasizes **containerized microservices** for **flexible deployment topologies**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to the following **standards**:
  - **BIM Standards**: **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** for **semantic interoperability** and **COBie** for **asset data exchange**.
  - **IoT/OT Standards**: **OPC UA** for **industrial device integration** and **MQTT** for **telemetry protocols**.
  - **Middleware Standards**: **Eclipse Ditto’s** **Thing Model** for **device semantics** and **Eclipse Hono’s** **telemetry APIs**.
  The architecture emphasizes **modular standardization** to enable **plug-and-play integration** with **third-party systems** (e.g., ERP, CMMS)."
]
